4.1.9.2 TransDataTo5HD
Function Usage
Converts the NCHW format to the NC1HWC0 format. It can also be used for
transposing a two-dimensional matrix data block. Compared with Transpose that
supports only 16 x 16 matrix transpose, this API can process 512-byte data (16
data blocks) in a single repeat, and supports multiple repeats and matrix
